chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Appln. No.S- 406 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of pre-arrest bail 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of pre-arrest bail. 31.07.2025 Mr. Mansoor Ahmed Shaikh, Deputy PG for the State >>>>>..<<<<< This matter was first taken up by this Court at 9:35 am, when neither applicant/accused nor his Counsel appeared. A perusal of the record reflects that on 14.07.2025 when this matter was taken up none of them were present but subsequently later both appeared and sought indulgence of the Court whereafter on the said date NBWs issued against the applicant/accused were withdrawn on 14.7.2025. Today, this is second call and it is now 10:55 am neither applicant/accused nor his Counsel are present. No intimation is received. The conduct of the applicant/accused and his Counsel, prima facie suggests that they have lost interest to proceed with this matter diligently. Accordingly, the ad-interim pre-arrest bail granted to the applicant/accused by this Court vide order dated 16.05.2025 is hereby recalled and the instant Criminal Bail Application is dismissed for non-prosecution. Office is directed to communicate this order to the SHO concerned as well as trial Court for information. Judge ARBROHI/PS
